strings.enrichment.failedDescription: The API returned an error while enriching the document.
strings.enrichment.selectPlugin: Select plugin you want to use for enrichment
strings.enrichment.selectSource: Select source you want to enrich
strings.enrichment.tooltipDotNotation: `Dot notation` is supported for nested fields, i.e.: field1.field2, arrayfield[0].field3, and so on.
strings.enrichment.tooltipIntro: A dict with key/value pairs to be updated (`enriched`) in the document, following this pattern:
strings.enrichment.tooltipMix: A mix of the two is also possible.
strings.enrichment.tooltipNullExample: will enrich using values from `host.name` and `ip.address` fields in the document.
strings.enrichment.tooltipNullValue: A field with a None value will trigger plugin to get the value from the document and process it with the enrichment source.
strings.enrichment.tooltipSetExample: will enrich "host.name" and "ip.address" using provided values.
strings.enrichment.tooltipSetValue: A field with a value set will trigger `plugin` to process that value with the enrichment source.
strings.enrichment.tooltipSummary: Define key/value pairs for enrichment. Use `empty` values to extract data from the document, or specific values to override/add new data. Supports dot notation for nested fields.
